name: The Ice-Bound God
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If 2 or more WATER monsters are on the field: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. If a Level 5 or higher WATER monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "The Ice-Bound God" once per turn.
eff: If 2 or more WATER monsters are on the field: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. If a Level 5 or higher WATER monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "The Ice-Bound God" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
